nasb.text: For this reason the Jews were persecuting Jesus, because He was doing these things on the Sabbath.

esv.text: And this was why the Jews were persecuting Jesus, because he was doing these things on the Sabbath.

cnv.text: 從此猶太人就迫害耶穌，因為他常常在安息日作這些事。

ccb.text: 因为耶稣在安息日给人治病，犹太人开始迫害祂。

csbs.text: 那些犹太人之所以逼迫耶稣，是因为他在安息日做这些事。
